stemHtml: What are the effects of orographic (upslope) movement over a mountain on aircraft icing?

options.b: Uphill movement increases the concentration and size of supercooled water droplets, increasing the severity of icing.
options.c: Uphill movement decreases the concentration and size of supercooled water droplets, decreasing the severity of icing.
options.d: Uphill movement reduces icing due to adiabatic cooling.
